diagrams.title: Two-Set Venn Diagram for PIE
diagrams.description: Shows two overlapping circles representing sets A and B with their intersection
diagrams.purpose: Visualize why we subtract intersection: elements in A∩B counted twice if we just add |A| + |B|

diagrams.title: Three-Set Venn Diagram for PIE
diagrams.description: Three mutually overlapping circles arranged in triangular pattern
diagrams.purpose: Shows how each region is counted at different levels - helps understand alternating + and - operations

diagrams.title: PIE Sign Pattern Diagram
diagrams.description: Tree or flow diagram showing + - + - alternating pattern
diagrams.purpose: Mnemonic for PIE formula structure: odd levels added, even levels subtracted

diagrams.title: Derangement Visual - Fixed Points Method
diagrams.description: Shows permutation as bars with potential positions, demonstrating counting approach
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how derangements subtract cases with fixed points using inclusion-exclusion
